title: BuildVision HD
description: BuildVision HD is a texture pack that helps builders recognize the tools used by certain build plugins.
body:
![BV HD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf7dfeefa1de2be1f2dfa10a06b6a31705c16a7.jpeg)# 🧱 BuildVision HD

**BuildVision HD** is a texture pack specially designed for Minecraft builders.

It highlights the tools used by major building plugins such as **FAWE**, **VoxelSniper**, **GoBrush**, **GoPaint**, and **Arceon**, making them easily recognizable.

---

## 🔨 Purpose

Whether you're a beginner or an experienced builder, this pack helps you:

- Quickly identify essential tools  
- Improve your workflow  
- Build more efficiently without confusion  

---

## 🎯 Ideal For

BuildVision HD is perfect for:

- 🏗 Creative servers  
- 🏛 Architectural projects  
- 🌍 Large terraforming builds  

---

## ✨ Experience

This texture pack makes your building experience:

- More intuitive  
- More fluid  
- More enjoyable  

It acts as a visual guide, helping you stay focused on building without getting lost in your tools.

---

## 🚀 Conclusion

BuildVision HD is the perfect ally for bringing your ideas to life while keeping your workflow clean and efficient.
